text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Due to Nakayama Racecourse being under
construction, this year's Satsuki Sho will be held
at Tokyo Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: The ground is trembling.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Both the vibrations I feel seeping through my
cleats and the electric energy pervading the air
are born from the spectators gathered here.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
So this is how heated a Classic Triple Crown race
can be...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Heh, to think that the day would come that I
would be racing in the Satsuki Sho...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(I never even dreamt of such a future when I was
young...)

text_block_list.name: Young Yaeno
text_block_list.text:
Aaargh! How dare they say that to me! How dare
they, how dare they, how dare they?!

text_block_list.name: Young Yaeno
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... I can't get angry... Water still, water still... Tame the blaze fierce with water still...

text_block_list.name: Young Yaeno
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Waaah! I can't do it! Raaaaah! I'm so mad and angry and—

text_block_list.name: Young Yaeno
text_block_list.text: AAAUGHHH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud, thud, thud, thud, thud!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno. What did I teach you to do when you're
angry?

text_block_list.name: Young Yaeno
text_block_list.text:
Hngh... Yah! Yah! Yah! Yah! I'm so mad! I'm so
mad! Take that!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
Very good. Channel the anger into your fists.
Follow the path of your rage, and release it bit by
bit.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
As long as you're practicing katas, you may swing
and throw your fists to your heart's content, until
you are at peace with your emotions.

text_block_list.name: Young Yaeno
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
Have you calmed down? Now you must reflect.
What is it that made you so angry?

text_block_list.name: Young Yaeno
text_block_list.text:
It was that bully! He said such mean things! But... I
was the one who started it.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
It appears you've realized what you've done
wrong. Now that you know, you must right it. You
must learn to think before your anger takes hold
of you.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(It took a very long time before I learned how to
contain my fierce blaze.)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(If Grampa hadn't been there to accept and guide
me, I would still be walking the wrong path in
life.)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: If I want to repay my debt to Grampa...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I have to claim victory on this prestigious stage
and show him how much I've grown!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Victory shall be mine!
choice_data_list:
Yeah, bring home the trophy for your
grandfather!

Yeah, bring home the trophy for your
grandfather!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Osu! I'll be off!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Yaeno Muteki, ready for battle!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, she looks super fired up! Let's see... Looks
like her name's Yaeno Muteki. I wonder if she's
any good?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Sigh. If only she was racing today! It's too bad she had to sit out because of an injury. She definitely would've been the favorite.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, but Sakura Chiyono O is running and she
beat your fave! I'm pretty sure she's gonna be the
one to win today.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: (...Don't let it bother you. Focus on yourself!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Yaeno Muteki's got something real unique
about her!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, it's not just her clothes, either. That martial
arts-looking pose she just did was so dignified
and cool!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yaeno's so focused!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
There's some gigantic force surging out of her in
huge waves! I can feel it from here!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I can't just match her energy—I have to beat it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I'm the one who's going to win here!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yaeno... Chiyono O...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
How vexing... I wish I could be out there in the
fray as well, pitting my will against yours!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But... for the sake of the upcoming Japanese
Derby...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I must stay back and just bear witness to your
race.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: The blaze fierce and waters still are now as one.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'll show everyone I can control the roaring flames
in my heart!
